title: NATO Strikes Taliban Militants in Pakistani Territory
summary: The covert understanding between the Pakistani government and NATO/ISAF in Afghanistan regarding direct U.S. military action in Pakistan's tribal areas is hardly a secret anymore.
body: This page is for archival purposes as its content is no longer available. Please contact us for more information or use the search box in case this isn't what you are looking for.
